chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-881 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on CMA 3457/24 2.For orders on office objections. 3.For orders on CMA 3458/24 4.For hearing of main case. 29-05-2024 Mr. Arif Ali Abbasi, Advocate for petitioners. ***** 1. Urgency is granted. 2-4. This petition has been filed for issuance of Bardana/Wheat Bags from the Food Department. Record shows that petitioners before filing this petition have never approached the relevant officials for the purpose and there is no proof that the request of the petitioners has been declined. No case for indulgence therefore is made out. Accordingly, this petition along with listed application(s) is dismissed in limine. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
